case_title: NOW COURIER VS WINTERS LINGEL H.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $845.10 FILED BY NOW COURIER AS TO DEFENDANT WINTERS LINGEL H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
